title: Kanbus clock: parent row should use parent issue type colors
description:
Observed: parent description row is colored using the current issue type instead of the parent issue type.

Expected: parent row background and text colors follow the parent issue type palette (epic=indigo, initiative=magenta, etc.), regardless of child issue type.

Acceptance:
- Parent row uses parent type colors on comment/created/transition cards.
- Child issue rows keep child type colors.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Starting fix: parent row palette should follow parent issue type. Updating kanbus_clock.py parent snapshot to include type and use parent band for parent row bg/text; updating React KanbusCard parent row bg to use parent band; adding test for parent row background color.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Update: parent row now uses parent issue type palette in Python kanbus_clock and React KanbusCard (parent bg/text derived from parent type). Added ParentSnapshot.issue_type_upper, adjusted parent_bg/parent_text_color in created/transition/comment. Tests: uv run python -m py_compile demos/kanbus_clock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (36 passed). Ready for visual confirmation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjusting parent row background to be between header and body (luminance-based) while staying in parent band; will update python + React and tests.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Update: parent row bg now chosen to sit between header and body luminance while staying in parent band. Added _pick_parent_row_bg and luma helper; applied to created/transition/comment. React KanbusCard now mirrors this selection. Tests: py_compile + pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (36 passed). Ready to verify on device.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Change request: lock parent row bg to step 3, issue row bg to step 2, main body bg to step 1 (no luminance logic). Will update python + React + tests.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applied requested background steps only: body bg step1, issue row bg step2, parent row bg step3 (parent band). Header bg stays step4. Text colors unchanged (base=7, attention=11, dim=6). Restarting clock for visual check.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Transition header colors: align ID/type/status to same intensity as parent row text (no brighter). Will set header_issue_type_color/status_color to base in transition/created to match parent row brightness.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Aligned header token colors across created/transition/comment: React KanbusCard now uses base color for id/type/status (no attention highlight). Python already set header_issue_type/status to base. Standard components + standard colors across screens.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fix: transition header status now uses attention color (base for id/type, attention for status). React KanbusCard statusColor set to attention for transition only. Added test for attention-colored status; pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (37 passed). Restarting clock for visual check.
